parameters.body: ={ "query": "mutation($input: AudioUploadInput) { uploadAudio(input: $input) { success title id } }", "variables": { "input": { "url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DeveloperAlly/ai-and-agents/main/transcripts/{{ $('Build Metadata').first().json.folderName }}/audio.mp3", "title": "{{ $('Build Metadata').first().json.metadata.title }}", "attendees": [{"displayName": "{{ $('Build Metadata').first().json.metadata.channel }}", "email": "channel@youtube.com"}] } } }

={ "query": "query Transcript($id: String!) { transcript(id: $id) { id title date sentences { index speaker_name text start_time end_time } summary { overview bullet_gist keywords action_items short_summary } } }", "variables": { "id": "{{ $('Submit to Fireflies').first().json.data.uploadAudio.id }}" } }
